title: Working with People column with API
excerpt: I’m using Integromat and I’m trying to get the value of the people column in our public employee board on Monday and passing it to a different people column in a different board of tasks. Could you please guide me on how…

posts.author: DavidBT (David Ben-Tolila)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using Integromat and I’m trying to get the value of the people column in our public employee board on Monday and passing it to a different people column in a different board of tasks. Could you please guide me on how to do it? I get an error message that says “Function ‘stringifyColumnValues’ finished with error! resultCValue.personsAndTeams.map is not a function”

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DavidBT,
when do you get that error?
I guess it’s related to the configuration of your Integromat recipe.
Could you share further details?

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DavidBT ,

MDN Web Docs have an article about your topic. This is where you can start :

developer.mozilla.org

TypeError: "x" is not a function - JavaScript | MDN

The JavaScript exception "is not a function" occurs when there was an attempt to call a value from a function, but the value is not actually a function.
